description: The Grabbable component allows you to grab any slot it is attached to, provided it has some type of Collider.

fields.ReparentOnRelease: The slot is reparented to the value of ``_lastParent``, instead of root when dropped __TPL__
fields.PreserveUserSpace: The slot is reparented to Local User Space __TPL__
fields.DestroyOnRelease: The slot this component is attached to is destroyed upon release
fields.GrabPriorityWhenGrabbed: Optionally changes the grab priority of the object when it is already being grabbed. Useful for different behavior when it can be grab stolen by another player.
fields.CustomCanGrabCheck: Not Usable inside Resonite Requires a mod for interacting with Sync Delegates
fields.EditModeOnly: Determines if this grabbable is effective only in Edit Mode
fields.AllowSteal: Other users can grab the slot this component is attached to. Like a flag in capture the flag.
fields.DropOnDisable: The parent slot will be dropped when this component is disabled.
fields.ActiveUserFilter: Changes if this component can be grabbed based on who is the active user if any.
fields.OnlyUsers: A list of users that are allowed to grab this slot.
fields.AllowOnlyPhysicalGrab: Only allow grab an object with a physical interaction - remote grabs are not allowed
fields._grabber: Automatically Assigned, the grabber that is grabbing this component.
fields._lastParent: Automatically Assigned, the last parent this slot had. Is used to parent the slot back (if allowed) when let go of.
fields._lastParentIsUserSpace: Automatically Assigned Whether the last parent slot is the user space slot of the user grabbing this.
fields.__legacyActiveUserRootOnly: Automatically Assigned Legacy do not use. Used to handle whether only the active user can grab. Use ``ActiveUserFilter`` instead!
